command:
echo '=== TEST 1: doctor check (in-n8n, no SSH) ==='
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/moreno-unified-delegation-mcp-v1   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -d '{"action":"doctor"}' | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('ok:', d.get('ok'))
print('ollama_primary:', d.get('checks',{}).get('primary_ollama',{}).get('ok'))
print('ollama_aux:', d.get('checks',{}).get('auxiliary_ollama',{}).get('ok'))
print('delegator_config:', d.get('checks',{}).get('configuration',{}).get('ok'))
"

echo '=== TEST 2: submit_delegation → moreno-delegate → Ollama (full round-trip) ==='
RESULT=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/moreno-unified-delegation-mcp-v1   -H 'Content-Type: application/json'   -d '{
    "action": "submit_delegation",
    "instruction": "Reply with exactly one sentence: the governed delegation pipeline is working.",
    "priority": "low",
    "origin": "claude-pipeline-test",
    "requested_by": "jose"
  }' 2>&1)
echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
raw=sys.stdin.read()
try:
    d=json.loads(raw)
    print('ok:', d.get('ok'))
    print('task_id:', d.get('task_id'))
    print('status:', d.get('status'))
    print('worker:', d.get('worker'))
    print('model:', d.get('model'))
    r = d.get('response','')
    print('response (first 120):', r[:120])
except Exception as e:
    print('parse error:', e)
    print('raw (first 300):', raw[:300])
"
echo DONE_1909
